11 Oct 2017

Nice spot for breakfast. The view from the patio of our VRBO…

11 Oct 2017

It’s not all sunshine and orchids in paradise. Somebody cut the fuel fill line on our rental and siphoned our gas while we were parked at the beach. Avis sent a truck to tow the Jeep and us back to the airport to get a replacement. The tow truck driver, John, was great though.

At Pua’a Ka’a State Park outside Hana, Hawai’i.

10 Oct 2017

The Road to Hana is paved with good banana bread.

09 Oct 2017

Outside the Ritz-Carlton Kapalua. The lizard was staying there, but we weren’t.

Discovered a new item for my bucket list at the same time I checked it off today:

☑️ Swim with sea turtles
